title: Scientific Instrumentation For Sensing And Imaging (NSF-Topic2-FY26-XLabsSensingandImaging)
funder_name: National Science Foundation (NSF) Directorate for Technology, Innovation and Partnerships (TIP)

entity_types: Any eligible organization (Maximum of two Written Proposals for Phase 0 as lead)
exclusions: Senior/Key Personnel on more than one Written Proposal per Topic
restrictions: Must align with current Topic Announcement
Must propose novel platform technology and use-inspired research solutions

timeline.event: Beginning of Phase 1 Go/No Go Selection

requirements.description: Proposals must be submitted electronically via the NSF submission website
Subject line of questions must include topic title
